scenarios.title: first meaningful task
scenarios.success_definition: the user completes the task and can restate the product value

scenarios.title: repeat core workflow
scenarios.primary_task: repeat the core task after the first-run context disappears
scenarios.success_definition: the user can re-enter the flow without rebuilding context from scratch

scenarios.title: recover from a rough edge
scenarios.primary_task: handle a confusing or unusual state and still reach a recoverable outcome
scenarios.success_definition: the user can recover without silent failure or dead-end confusion
